d: Orion summons a magical rapier at a designated location. For the next [[1.5]]s, it rapidly slashes all enemies within [[1]] tile, dealing [[40%]]<ATK> damage [[8]] times. After that, the rapier erupts in a burst of magic, dealing [[320%]]<ATK> damage once more and stunning enemies within range for [[3]]s.
Increases rapier slash damage to [[50%]]<ATK>, and the final magic burst damage to [[340%]]<ATK>.
Increases rapier slash damage to [[60%]]<ATK>, and the final magic burst damage to [[360%]]<ATK>.
Increases rapier slash damage to [[70%]]<ATK>, and the final magic burst damage to [[380%]]<ATK>.
Increases rapier slash damage to [[80%]]<ATK>, and the final magic burst damage to [[400%]]<ATK>.

Passive. When a battle starts, Orion enchants his rapier for [[15]]s. While the enchantment is active, he gains Energy [[25%]] faster, and each instance of damage from his skills or normal attacks applies a stacking Sear effect to enemies for [[3]]s. Each stack of Sear deals damage every second equal to [[20%]] of the base damage from the instance that applied it.
Active. Orion thrusts at the target [[4]] times in quick succession, dealing [[90%]]<ATK> damage with each thrust.
Increases thrust damage to [[100%]]<ATK>.
Increases thrust damage to [[110%]]<ATK>.
Increases thrust damage to [[120%]]<ATK>.

Passive. Whenever an ally grants Orion a temporary stat buff, the enchantment on his rapier is extended by [[10]]s, and that ally becomes his Supporter.
Active. Orion unleashes a magical slash in a [[1]]-tile frontal arc, dealing [[340%]]<ATK> damage and gaining a shield equal to [[160%]] of the damage dealt for [[6]]s. All his Supporters gain [[60%]] of the shield Orion gains.
Increases magical slash damage to [[360%]]<ATK>.
Increases magical slash damage to [[380%]]<ATK>.
Increases magical slash damage to [[400%]]<ATK>.
Orion increases his ATK by [[9%]] during battle. If he has Supporters on the battlefield, his ATK increases by an extra [[6%]].
Orion increases his ATK by [[12%]] during battle. If he has Supporters on the battlefield, his ATK increases by an extra [[8%]].
Orion increases his ATK by [[15%]] during battle. If he has Supporters on the battlefield, his ATK increases by an extra [[10%]].

Every time Orion gains a Supporter, he receives [[1]] stack of Authority, up to [[3]] stacks. Each stack of Authority increases Orion's damage dealt by [[10%]], reduces his damage taken by [[15%]], and extends the duration of Sear effects he inflicts by [[1]]s.
Increases the damage dealt bonus Orion gains from each Authority stack to [[12%]].

At [[3]] Authority stacks, Orion unleashes his full power, permanently activating his rapier enchantment. In addition, his Sear effect is upgraded for the rest of the battle: enemies afflicted for [[3]]s are [[silenced|silence]] and have their Vitality reduced by [[60]] until Sear expires.
Increases the damage dealt bonus Orion gains from each Authority stack to [[14%]].

r.d: In Rivalry Mode, reduces damage taken by [[10%]] for [[20]]s when a battle starts. [[20]]s later, increases damage dealt by [[10%]] for [[20]]s.
Lvl. 4 Refinement: In Rivalry Mode, increases 20 Crit, 15 Ranged DEF.

d: After gaining a total of [[3]] Authority stacks, Orion becomes [[unaffected|uncontrol]] for the rest of the battle, and the Sear effect he inflicts deals extra true damage equal to [[50%]] of the damage dealt.
